summary: Iteration 27: CEP/ViaCEP structured_address feature testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Registration form shows CEP field with auto-fill (Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF read-only), Profile Edit modal shows CEP-based fields with existing data loaded correctly. Save button disabled when CEP invalid.

issues: Some Ionicons names are invalid for the ionicons family (spa, medical-services, celebration, etc.) - shows '?' placeholder

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me accepts structured_address and saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me syncs flat city/neighborhood from structured_address
Backend: GET /api/offers/filters returns cities from establishments with active offers
Backend: GET /api/offers/filters?city=X returns neighborhoods for that city
Backend: GET /api/categories/with-counts returns categories sorted by offer count
Backend: ViaCEP API valid CEP returns correct data (01001-000 = Praça da Sé, São Paulo)
Backend: ViaCEP API invalid CEP returns error
Frontend: Registration form shows CEP field instead of free-text Endereço
Frontend: Typing valid CEP (01001-000) auto-fills Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF
Frontend: Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF fields are read-only (editable=false)
Frontend: Only Número and Complemento are editable
Frontend: Cadastrar button disabled when CEP is invalid, enabled when valid
Frontend: Profile Edit modal shows CEP-based fields
Frontend: Profile Edit loads existing structured_address correctly
Frontend: Profile Edit Save button enabled when CEP is valid
critical_code_review_comments: register.tsx: CEP field with ViaCEP lookup implemented correctly (lines 136-176)
register.tsx: Structured address fields (Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF) are read-only when CEP is valid
offers.tsx: Profile Edit modal has CEP-based fields (lines 1070-1136)
offers.tsx: saveProfileEdit sends structured_address to backend (lines 310-335)
server.py: EstablishmentCreate model has structured_address field (line 176)
server.py: create_establishment stores structured_address and syncs flat fields (lines 626-638)
server.py: offers/filters uses get_city() helper with fallback (lines 949-956)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test establishment 'Test CEP Updated' with structured_address
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 complete. CEP/ViaCEP structured_address feature fully implemented and tested. Registration form (/establishment/register) shows CEP field with auto-fill. Profile Edit modal (in offers.tsx step 3) shows CEP-based fields. Backend stores structured_address and syncs flat city/neighborhood fields. Filters use structured_address with fallback to flat fields for backward compatibility.

features_verified.registration_cep_field: WORKING - CEP field visible with placeholder 00000-000
features_verified.registration_cep_autofill: WORKING - ViaCEP lookup fills Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF
features_verified.registration_readonly_fields: WORKING - Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF are read-only
features_verified.registration_editable_fields: WORKING - Número and Complemento are editable
features_verified.registration_button_disabled: WORKING - Cadastrar disabled when CEP invalid
features_verified.profile_edit_cep_field: WORKING - CEP field in Profile Edit modal
features_verified.profile_edit_save_button: WORKING - Save enabled when CEP valid
features_verified.backend_flat_sync: WORKING - Flat city/neighborhood synced from structured_address
